user_query: give me the total sales amount for each customer
generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  SUM(i.total) AS total_sales_amount
FROM customer c
JOIN invoice i ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY c.customer_id;

user_query: show me customers and employees together in one list of names

user_query: show me customers and employees together in one list of names
llm_comment: -- COMMENT: combining customer and employee names into one list
raw_llm_response:
-- COMMENT: combining customer and employee names into one list
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  'customer' AS source_type
FROM customer
UNION ALL
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  'employee' AS source_type
FROM employee;

user_query: i want the top customer in each country by revenue
sanitized_query: i want the top customer in each country by revenue

user_query: i want the top customer in each country by revenue
llm_comment: -- COMMENT: top customer by invoice revenue within each billing country
raw_llm_response:
-- COMMENT: top customer by invoice revenue within each billing country
SELECT
  ranked.billing_country,
  ranked.customer_id,
  ranked.first_name,
  ranked.last_name,
  ranked.revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    i.billing_country,
    c.customer_id,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    SUM(i.total) AS revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY i.billing_country
      ORDER BY SUM(i.total) DESC, c.customer_id
    ) AS rn
  FROM invoice i
  JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
  GROUP BY i.billing_country, c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
) ranked
WHERE ranked.rn = 1
ORDER BY ranked.billing_country;
generated_sql:
SELECT
  ranked.billing_country,
  ranked.customer_id,
  ranked.first_name,
  ranked.last_name,
  ranked.revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    i.billing_country,
    c.customer_id,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    SUM(i.total) AS revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY i.billing_country
      ORDER BY SUM(i.total) DESC, c.customer_id
    ) AS rn
  FROM invoice i
  JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
  GROUP BY i.billing_country, c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
) ranked
WHERE ranked.rn = 1
ORDER BY ranked.billing_country;

user_query: what are the top 5 longest tracks?
sanitized_query: what are the top 5 longest tracks?

user_query: what are the top 5 longest tracks?
raw_llm_response:
-- COMMENT: top 5 tracks by duration
SELECT
  t.track_id,
  t.name,
  t.milliseconds
FROM track t
ORDER BY t.milliseconds DESC
LIMIT 5;
